author: Josh Medeski
description: Dynamically change your Obsidian background with wallpapers that adapt to what you're doing. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Josh Medeski
manifest.description: Dynamically change your background with wallpapers that adapt to what you're doing.
manifest.name: Dynamic Wallpapers

name: Dynamic Wallpapers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the assets below and place them in
`<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/dynamic-wallpapers-plugin/`, then enable **Dynamic Wallpaper**
in Settings → Community Plugins.

See the [README](https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers#installation) for BRAT and manual install instructions.

<!-- The full changelog of merged PRs and commits since the previous tag is appended below by GitHub. -->


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers/compare/1.1.3...1.2.0

releases.author: joshmedeski
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: backlink wallpaper inheritance + backlink-aware random pick by @joshmedeski in https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers/pull/5
* Replace ffmpeg with canvas thumbnails; add cache controls and clickable related-wallpaper cards by @joshmedeski in https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @joshmedeski made their first contribution in https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers/pull/5

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/joshmedeski/obsidian-dynamic-wallpapers/commits/1.1.1
